feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Going from gATP to AATP, is there an equivalent for EDQA in BOP?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have made the move going from gATP to AATP. We created the BOP run etc but we are still missing EDQA (event-driven quantity assignment). Currently we run the BOP very frequently to replicate EDQA however, this results in sales documents being locked frequently (for one second). 

Is there any way to replicate EDQA in AATP without having to run BOP every x minutes? I have looked at the roadmap but I haven't seen any mention for this yet.

Thanks a lot already!

entry.title: Cash discount indicator is automatically set in Material master SAP public cloud
entry.content:
In SAP Public cloud edition,
I see that in the while creating a material master through Fiori apps "Manage product master data", "Create material - MM01" and through migration cockpit also,

I'm seeing the cash discount indicator in Sales org 1 view is automatically set.
I can see that in SAP on-premise and cloud private editions, it was mentioned as an satndard behavior. (See SAP note 1813559).

Is this an standard behavior in SAP public cloud edition also?????

entry.title: Delivery report for Sales Scheduling agreements
entry.content:
Hi.

I have a requirement to generate a report that lists all outbound deliveries created for a specific Sales Scheduling Agreement in SAP public cloud.

The standard document flow within the Sales Scheduling Agreement does not meet the business requirement, as a different reporting format is needed. I have also tried using transaction VL06O, but there is no available option to filter by the Sales Scheduling Agreement number.

Requirements:

  1. A list/report of outbound deliveries created for a particular Sales Scheduling Agreement.

  2. The ability to filter the report by the Sales Scheduling Agreement number.

Could you please suggest any alternative standard reports, transactions, or approaches to achieve this?

entry.title: "Schedule Billing Creation" Batch job collective billing
entry.content:
Hi.

We are currently using the background job “Schedule Billing Creation” to automatically create billing documents for Sales Scheduling Agreements.

As part of this process, the job creates billing documents for outbound deliveries that have been goods issue posted and are available in the Billing Due List.

However, we are facing an issue where the batch job is combining all outbound deliveries related to a single Sales Scheduling Agreement into one invoice, with each outbound delivery appearing as a line item on the same invoice. This follows the concept of collective billing.

Our requirement is to prevent this behavior. We would like the batch job to create a separate invoice for each outbound delivery.

Could you please advise if there is any configuration available to ensure that this job generates only one invoice per outbound delivery?

I have updated the Billing Settings in the VF04 - Create Billing Documents Fiori app to create separate billing documents for each item in billing due list. But, still it's not working.

entry.title: How to change bank account on the invoice form in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a problem with the bank account on the invoice output. The invoice output only shows one specific bank account, even if this account is deactivated in the Manage Bank Accounts app. I set up a different bank account number in the same app that I want to show on the invoice form, but the change didn't show up in the output.
Could you please clarify where exactly I can specify or activate the bank account to be used for the invoice? Alternatively, what settings are required for this?

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: block Purchase requisitions creation when there is a delivery block active on sales order
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are using a delivery block on Sales orders received via EDI where we activated the purchase requisition block. However, when the mrp is running it keeps creating purchase requisitions. 

Is there a possibility to block PR creation for normal sales orders until all checks are done? 

I found out OSS note 738171 but it seems it is concerning item category TAS en TAB, thus not sure if this is relevant here.

Kr,

entry.title: OData V4 URL Encoding Issue with SAP Web Dispatcher + Proxy (Sales Order Management App)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are facing an issue with OData V4 URL encoding after activating the standard Sales Order Management application in S/4HANA.

Note: An SAP incident has already been created, and in parallel we are reaching out to the community to learn from experts who may have faced a similar issue.

Issue summary

The problem occurs because equal signs (=) in the OData V4 request URL are being URL-encoded (%3D) before the request reaches the S/4HANA ICM.

In the browser, the request URL is correct and the = signs are not encoded:

https://etgwdsp.etgworld.com/sap/opu/odata4/sap/c_salesordermanage_srv/srvd_f4/sap/c_orgdivisionvaluehelp/0001;ps='srvd-c_salesordermanage_sd-0001';va='com.sap.gateway.srvd.c_salesordermanage_sd.v0001.ae-c_salesordermanage.createwithsalesordertype.organizationdivision.SalesOrderManageType.X'/$metadata?sap-language=EN

However, when the request reaches the ICM, the raw HTTP request shows that:

  • = is encoded as %3D

  • %27 is converted back to '

Example from ICM level 3 trace:

GET /sap/opu/odata4/.../0001;ps%3D'srvd-c_salesordermanage_sd-0001';va%3D'com.sap.gateway.srvd.c_salesordermanage_sd.v0001.ae-c_salesordermanage.createwithsalesordertype.organizationdivision.SalesOrderManageType.X'/$metadata?sap-language=EN

The SAP Gateway expects the “=” characters to remain unencoded, and because of this encoding, the request fails.

Landscape and behavior

Middleware involved

  • SAP Web Dispatcher

  • Corporate HTTP Proxy

Observed behavior

  1. All apps work when the proxy is bypassed (Web Dispatcher active)

  2. All apps work when the Web Dispatcher is bypassed (proxy active)

  3. The issue occurs only when both proxy and Web Dispatcher are active

This strongly indicates that the URL is being modified due to an interaction between the proxy and Web Dispatcher.

Troubleshooting performed

  • All required roles, authorizations, services, and ICF nodes are active

  • Web Dispatcher profile parameters adjusted to prevent URL encoding

  • Web Dispatcher mod file changes attempted for OData V4 handling
    → Issue still persists

As per internal network team analysis:

  • A change may be required in the Web Dispatcher index file

  • Neither the network team nor BASIS team has access to modify it

  • Only SAP can make changes at this level

Questions to the community

  • Has anyone experienced a similar OData V4 URL encoding issue with Web Dispatcher + proxy?

  • Is this a known limitation or defect in SAP Web Dispatcher for OData V4?

  • Are there any supported parameters, SAP Notes, or workarounds to prevent encoding of = in the URL?

  • Should this be handled via ICM settings, Web Dispatcher configuration, or proxy rules?

  • Is there any recommended architectural workaround until SAP provides a fix?

Any guidance, experiences, or references would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance for your support.

Varsha J S

 

#SAP #S4HANA #ODataV4 #SAPGateway #SAPWebDispatcher #ICM #SAPBasis #SAPFiori #SAPCommunity
@SAP @SAPCommunity @SAPSupport

entry.title: configuration missing and change showing only created log
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have LDPI (downpayment) configured in system. now when we tried to create order, we are getting missing item categories. Then i checked in item category determination, i am unable to see any assignments to document type LDPI. change logs showing only created not the deleted log. Also, i tried to configure in CBC configuration but it is disabled.
Can anyone assist on this.

Regards,

Rajesh

entry.title: SAP HANA Rebates: Partner determination for Contract Rebate
entry.content:
Hi Community!

I have a customer in SAP HANA requesting that in Contract Rebates could be by SHIP TO PARTY instead of PI Invoicing Party.  In configuration I see that I can change the partner but I'm not sure if all Invoice documents will be taken into account since Invoice documents have not Ship to party partner.

Could you please help me to understand if I change Contract Rebates partner to SH will be take all Invoice document for Settlement?

 

Regards

Mirtha

entry.title: SmartForms: One Delivery Order with Multiple Customer POs Prints as Separate Invoices
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are facing the following scenario in SAP SD billing and invoice printing (SmartForms):

We have one Delivery Order, but the delivery contains items referencing multiple customer Purchase Order numbers. When billing is created and printed, SAP generates two separate invoices (different invoice numbers and separate print copies).

Business would ideally like the invoice to be printed as a single consolidated copy, even though there are multiple PO references.

We have verified that:

  • Same customer

  • Same Sales Order

  • Same Delivery Order

  • Same currency and payment terms

The only difference is the Customer PO number.

Questions:

  1. Is this standard SAP behavior (invoice split by customer PO)?
  2. Is there any standard configuration or SmartForms approach to prevent printing into two separate copies?
  3. If not, is enhancement the only option — and what are the usual considerations?

Thank you in advance for your advice.

System generates two invoice files from the same Delivery Order because the Customer PO number differs.

Field File A File B

Invoice No60320023046032002303
Delivery Order60100023276010002327
Sales Order134513134513
CustomerCustomer321Customer321
Payment TermsDue 30 DaysDue 30 Days
CurrencySGDSGD
Customer POSA02-1830102764SA02-1830088258

entry.title: characteristic values getting assigned automatically in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am creating a sales order for a product marked for VC. when I create a sales order system automatically assigning the values to characteristics and also screen for the characteristic valuation not getting populated.. I am not able to figure it out how it is happening.  Please help. 

I have to click on item details configuration button and observed that Values are assigned automatically.

Values are greyed out and I can not change them also. I clicked on object dependencies to check whether any OD's causing this but it says no OD's. 

Thanks

Kumar

entry.title: Trading partner determination for PGI Material accounting document during intercompany transaction
entry.content:
I have created an intercompany sales order for an end customer as the material is sourced from a different plant.

During PGI of delivery, we are getting issue related to invalid trading partner.

In I/C sales order, we have sold-to party ABC, sales org 1234, delivering plant 5678.

We have maintained config in OVVA (internal customer for sales org intercompany transactions)

When we post PGI for the delivery, it is determining the trading in material accounting doc which is related to a different sales org (ex: 3456). How do we check how the customer OR trading partner is being determined for the inventory accounting (PGI) document between customer 1234 (for sales org 1234) & supplier 5678 (delivering plant 5678).

entry.title: Delivery Locked on Auto Invoice via BAPI
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

We have a business requirement to automatically create an invoice when posting a goods issue in VL02N.

The invoice creation itself works fine. However, when we try to link it to the delivery flow via a BAPI, the system returns 'Delivery Locked'.

This seems expected because a customized output type (with a special function type) is triggered immediately when posting the goods issue. At that moment, the standard system behavior temporarily locks the delivery, preventing the BAPI from updating the delivery document flow with the invoice.

This issue is blocking my process. Any guidance, best practices, or workarounds to handle this scenario would be highly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Product Division in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

Currently customer has 1 sales org. with 4 divisions. Products are segregated as per the division. Sales Org. (1000) having 4 different divisions (10, 20, 30, 40) for sales and 2 distribution channels (wholesale and Retail (newly added)). As per customer requirement, wholesale distribution channel cannot sell product across divisions in single sales order, but retail distribution channel must allow selling products across different divisions in a single sales order.

In Product Master if we maintain the division in basic data then same is extended to Sales org. as well applicable to all distribution channels. This will prevent selling products in Retail distribution channel when products from different divisions required in single sale order. If Division not maintained in the Product master, then system will not restrict selling products across the division in wholesale distribution channel. We have proposed creation of separate division (00-Common) used for Retail sales and maintenance of Product exclusion at sales area level. But customer is highlighting lot of data maintenance required for the exclusion. Any better suggestion will be helpful.

entry.title: Intercompany Order-Related Billing (Output document RDIV/report RVIVAUFT) -Vendor Invoice Generation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using Advanced IC Sales functionality (goods are being sold to consumer through selling company with delivery done by delivering company). As a part of standard process we are generating IC customer billing document (in delivering company) and IC vendor invoice (in selling company).

Sometimes we need to perform customer refund (selling company customer cedit memo) with its re-issuing to delivering company as intercompany credit memo. 

The standard solution supports RDIV (report RVIVAUFT) output document for billing, which triggers IC invoice/credit memo. It works fine - IGA document was generated and released in FI, but it represents only 1 side of operation (customer) - to finish the process I need to post respective vendor credit memo in 2nd company.

I tried using RD04 output, but it works only if purchase order is in place - for such refund process they are not in use.

What is the way I can trigger and generate vendor credit memo after RDIV document processing?

entry.title: How to maintain TD vehicle master name in alternate languages?
entry.content:
How to maintain TD vehicle master text in alternate languages?

I am able to see the text in EN & FR for some vehicles in table OIGVT. How maintain in other languages?

entry.title: Reversal of partial settlement incorrect on account assignment for accrual reversal condition
entry.content:
Dears

I am facing a problem that the system does not reverse a partial settlement (or final for that matter) because of unbalanced document.

For a French Sales Org the original document is as Z* condition types copied from standard

Header: 

Item with accruals reversal:

Account assignment for this item

00000001 _________________________________________________________________________
00000001 Tax accounts will be determined for item 000001
00000001 Tax account will be determined for account key ESA
00000001 Tax account 0000015452 found and posted with posting key 50
00000001 _________________________________________________________________________
00000001 Tax accounts will be determined for item 000001
00000001 Tax account will be determined for account key ESE
00000001 Tax account 0000015401 found and posted with posting key 40
00000001 _________________________________________________________________________
00000001 Vendor 0000100248 posted with reconciliation account and posting key 31
00000001 _________________________________________________________________________
00000001 Account determination for condition type ZCA2 ()
00000001 Account determination: acc.key, ZC1 val.grpg code Acct Mod. val.class
00000001 Account 0000048610 will be posted with posting key 50 (transaction ZCA2)
00000001 Account determination for condition type ZCA2 (Commission AccrRev)
00000001 Account determination: acc.key, ZC2 val.grpg code Acct Mod. val.class ZCA2
00000001 Account 0000009696 will be posted with posting key 40 (transaction ZCA2)
00000001 _________________________________________________________________________
00000001 Account determination for condition type ZCS1 (External Commission)
00000001 Account determination: acc.key, val.grpg code Acct Mod. val.class ZCS1
00000001 Account 0000048610 will be posted with posting key 40 (transaction ZCS1)

The reversal document looks like:

Header:

Same item as before:

 

Account assignment for the same item including main messages with the error

FI/CO Interface: Balance in Transaction Currency 28.101,00- (EUR)
Document INT0000001 has status C and is complete
Chart of accounts SGL determined for company code FR01
The posting document is created with transaction RMRP (Incoming invoice)
_________________________________________________________________________
Tax accounts will be determined for item 000001
Tax account will be determined for account key ESA
Tax account 0000015452 found and posted with posting key 40
_________________________________________________________________________
Tax accounts will be determined for item 000001
Tax account will be determined for account key ESE
Tax account 0000015401 found and posted with posting key 50
_________________________________________________________________________
Vendor 0000100248 posted with reconciliation account and posting key 21
_________________________________________________________________________
Account determination for condition type ZCA2 ()
Account determination: acc.key, ZC1 val.grpg code Acct Mod. val.class
Account 0000048610 will be posted with posting key 40 (transaction ZCA2)
Account 0000048610 will be posted with posting key 50 (transaction ZCA2)
Account determination for condition type ZCA2 (Commission AccrRev)
Account determination: acc.key, ZC2 val.grpg code Acct Mod. val.class ZCA2
Account 0000009696 will be posted with posting key 50 (transaction ZCA2)
_________________________________________________________________________
Account determination for condition type ZCS1 (External Commission)
Account determination: acc.key, val.grpg code Acct Mod. val.class ZCS1
Account 0000048610 will be posted with posting key 50 (transaction ZCS1)

As you can see in the reversal - the red marked line is trying to post to the same G/L account with posting Key 50 (besides the 40) and because of this the document is unbalanced.

The settings for the condition contract are shared amongst several sales orgs and if I do the same for a German Sales Org (again same settings - same G/L accounts) the system reverts the document without any issue.

This occurs only in reversal of partial settlement and not in any other cases.

Any idea on how we can see why the system is trying to post with that other account key 50 besides de correct one of 40 (that reverts the original document posting)?

entry.title: Create a Sales Order with reference to Contract in cross Sales Area
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have a requirement wherein user will be creating a Global Contract, and the Sales Orders will be created with reference to the Contract but it will be Cross Sales Area.

Eg. I have created a Quantity Contract  for Amul India where Sales Area is 1000/10/10 and thereafter I will create a Sales Order for Amul Jamnagar with reference to the Contract wherein Amul Jamnagar belongs to 1001/10/10 and the 2nd Sales Order with reference to the Contract where the Customer is Amul Pune and so on.

We are on SAP RISE 2023.

I have tried using the Reference Sales Organisation /Reference Distribution Channel and Reference Division along with Common Distribn Channel and Common Division but nothing works.

I have tried Customer Hierarchy but that is also of no use eg.   1A Hierarchy is Amul India and 2A is Amul Jamnagar and Amul Pune.

Is there any standard solution for this OR what are the enhancements required to achieve this.

Someone please help me on this.

Thanks and Regards.

Saurav Mallick.

entry.title: vl10b is not showing the due list for created STO's
entry.content:
Hii all,

I have created a STO and it successfully got created, but when I took the po number and tried to open that in VL10B Tcode, it is blank. So I have tried multiple orders with different materials but the same problem. Here is the reference image. Please help me.

entry.title: Customer Invoices based on batches from Outbound delivery - Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a business requirement (Public Cloud) where we have to create invoices based on the batches from the outbound delivery.

For example, if we have 3 batches for a line item in the outbound delivery. When we want to invoice, it is required to create the first invoice only for first 2 batches and later second invoice to be created for the 3rd batch. User will decide which batch to be invoiced.

Do we have any solution for this requirement? User don't want to create one line item per batch in the outbound delivery as the number of batches will be high for a line item.

Thanks in advance.

With Regards

Vinu Nanjan
